title: YTPMV: Gotta Drake Fast
description:
In this video, Drake Paul goes against the gang's advice about releasing a song about how he doesn't diddle kids.

This was made almost entirely with "The Heart Part 6" and "First Person Shooter". Zero AI was used. None. Zilch. Nada. I'd be more than happy to post the receipts, which is apparently something BBL Drizzy doesn't know how to do.
